HomePage.name: Fehizoroniaina Indrafo
HomePage.title: Developer Full Stack Mobile
HomePage.biography: React Native developer, adaptable and proactive, passionate about mobile development. I'm convinced that smartphones are a powerful lever for delivering a fluid, fast and accessible user experience. My aim is to contribute to innovative projects that improve users' daily lives through effective, intuitive and sustainable mobile solutions.

ServicesPage.serviceTitle: What can I do for you ?
ServicesPage.mobile: Today, having a mobile app is no longer a luxury, it is a necessity for businesses that want to connect with their customers and offer a seamless, fast and accessible experience at all times. As a mobile developer specialising in React Native, I design high-performance apps that are compatible with both Android and iOS, while optimising costs and development times. My goal is to transform your ideas into modern, intuitive, user-centric apps that can make a real impact on your business.
ServicesPage.web: Having a strong web presence is essential today for any business that wants to exist and thrive in the digital world. A well-designed website is more than just a showcase: it becomes a strategic tool for presenting your business, attracting new customers, automating certain tasks, and selling your products and services. I design customised web solutions tailored to your objectives, enhancing your image and offering a smooth and intuitive experience for your visitors.

projectsDescription: A mobile application for ordering and home delivery, designed to offer a simple, fast and intuitive experience.
Designed for choirs, this application facilitates song rehearsals while enhancing visibility.
Mobile solution dedicated to library management: viewing current loans and updating books.
Mobile application enabling companies to efficiently manage their employees and simplify the viewing and tracking of salaries.
Portfolio website designed to showcase my projects, skills, and achievements in development, with a modern and intuitive interface.
Web application developed for the management and authorisation of precious stones leaving Ivato Antananarivo Airport.
Web solution developed for Orange Madagascar to optimise the management of its product catalogue. It simplifies the creation, tracking and archiving of offers.
Web application designed for the Customer Service Department of Bank Of Africa, aimed at automating the entry and monitoring of payment method stocks.
